description: FINRA Daily Short Volume & Squeeze-Setup Engine. Parses CNMS Reg SHO file, computes per-ticker SVR, z-scores vs 60-day distribution, momentum, days-to-cover, climax detection. Detects squeeze setups via composite score with price strength overlay. Universe: S&P 500 with full US history maintenance.

schedule.description: Daily 1:00 AM UTC (8:00 PM ET prior day) Tue-Sat — covers Mon-Fri trading days; FINRA publishes T+1 at ~7:45 PM ET
